golden_rule: Behavior before migration == behavior after migration unless intentional UX improvement.

capabilities.name: Conversation orchestration
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff chats with Aria and gets routed, remembered, helpful replies.

capabilities.name: Uncensored operating profile
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff unlocks uncensored mode and uses unrestricted local models.

capabilities.name: Intent routing + NLU learning
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff's utterance routes to the correct action; corrections stick after confirmations.

capabilities.name: Model routing / Ollama
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff's chats/code use the configured models for each profile.

capabilities.name: Long-term and working memory
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff asks Aria to remember/recall facts across sessions.

capabilities.name: Knowledge, RAG, reference
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff searches docs/knowledge and gets local-first reference answers.

capabilities.name: Preferences and profiles
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff's work/gaming/offline profile and learned prefs apply.

capabilities.name: Planner and agents
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff runs multi-step plans and agent jobs that checkpoint.

capabilities.name: Context assembly
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Each turn sees assembled context (memory, profile, project).

capabilities.name: Learning writes via Governor
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Corrections and remembers persist exactly as before Phase 1.

capabilities.name: Coding assist and jobs
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff gets code proposals, apply/undo, MCP coding tools.

capabilities.name: Voice STT/TTS/wake
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff speaks and hears Aria; wakeword works when enabled.

capabilities.name: Audio/music studio
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff runs music/VST/song studio jobs.

capabilities.name: Vision/image/video/ComfyUI
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff generates/analyzes images and video; uncensored NSFW defaults when profile on.

capabilities.name: Fly tying domain
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff searches patterns/materials and uses Fly Tying tab.

capabilities.name: Home Assistant / Kasa
capabilities.user_visible_behavior: Jeff toggles lights/scenes via chat, GUI, MCP.
